config.memory_analysis.auto_notice: 自适应记忆策略始终处于启用状态
config.memory_analysis.auto_desc: AuraGo 会根据实时记忆健康度和检索质量自动启用统一记忆上下文、有效性跟踪、实时提取、查询扩展和重排序。
config.memory_analysis.realtime_desc: 在后台分析每条用户消息以查找值得记忆的内容(偏好、事实、更正)。异步运行。
config.memory_analysis.threshold_desc: 置信阈值(0.0–1.0),超过此值时提取的记忆将自动存储,无需用户确认。
config.memory_analysis.reflection_desc: 生成每周摘要,分析记忆模式、矛盾和知识缺口。
config.memory_analysis.preset_desc: Choose a safe rollout level instead of enabling every memory-analysis path at once.
config.memory_analysis.preset_full: Full: reflection + query expansion + reranking + real-time
config.memory_analysis.disabled_desc: Enable it to let the agent analyze conversations and extract memory-worthy content. AuraGo uses the central Helper LLM for the batched helper path when it is available.
config.memory_analysis.provider_desc: Memory analysis uses the central Helper LLM from the LLM settings. If it is disabled, this feature cannot use the dedicated batched helper path.
